title: engines.engine_intent_bypassed
description: ADR-038 Layer 3 (WS-277) terminal event — fired when /engine is invoked with --just-run (or /engine!!), bypassing cwos-frame pre-flight entirely. Recorded silently per Decision #3 (zero-resistance escape valve); used by post-hoc analysis to measure whether bypass correlates with re-runs (AS-INTENT-1 falsification signal).

bypass_reason.description: founder-explicit = --just-run flag; ai-autonomous = autopilot batch mode

would_have_been_contract.description: If cwos-frame compose ran before bypass, snapshot of the would-be contract. Null when bypass short-circuited everything (typical case).
